metadata.primary_platforms: iOS (Swift), Android (Kotlin), React Native, Flutter, Kotlin Multiplatform
metadata.latest_updates: Refreshed baselines to be version-agnostic, removed future-specific claims, and emphasized official release notes/policies for iOS, Android, React Native, Expo, and KMP.

ios_swift.name: Swift Programming Language
